arts.ttl: “Closed off” | Lopetegui hints that he never wanted to join West Ham
arts.sum: Julen Lopetegui suggests he never wanted West Ham in the first place. An absolutely shambolic tenure saw Julen Lopetegui become the shortest reigning permanent manager the club has ever had. What exactly went so wrong is hard to pinpoint but on the pitch it looked like there was no real plan or system. However, the... arts.ttl: “Minds at ease” | Supercomputer gives West Ham relegation verdict
arts.sum: West Ham’s chance of relegation has been revealed by a super computer. With the club hardly experiencing a new manager bounce, West Ham fans are having to once again discuss the possibility of relegation. As it stands, they’re 10 points above Ipswich and Leicester who both sit within the bottom 3. While that’s a sizable... arts.ttl: Arsenal handed Dusan Vlahovic boost as Juventus name 'fair' asking price

arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has demanded that Raheem Sterling step up to earn minutes as he refused to use the winger’s age as an excuse. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes telling Raheem Stelling statement as Arsenal struggles laid bare
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling is yet to score a Premier League goal for Arsenal but Mikel Arteta reckons the forward, on loan from Chelsea, can still have a big say on the Gunners' season

arts.ttl: West Ham star Michail Antonio 'back running' just three months after horrific car crash
arts.sum: West Ham striker Michail Antonio has been away in the Middle East for a warm-weather training camp less than three months after fracturing his leg in a horrifying car accident

arts.ttl: Who is Callan Hamill? Arsenal first 2025 signing who 'rejected' Celtic and Rangers
arts.sum: Scotland youth international Callan Hamill is said to be signing for Arsenal this summer after the Gunners agreed a six-figure deal with St Johnstone. Ruell Walters, another then-teenage defender, also left the Gunners last summer after turning down a contract extension, joining Luton Town.
